title: Juris Fun Stuff
description: Fun items to toy around with, including a Pogo Stick, a Skateboard and a Tennis Racket!
body: Used on the [MCreative SMP](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mcreative-smp) This mod adds a few fun to use items! Here are some items (And more that you can find in the gallery, like the rideable arrow or the umbrella hat!): -- Blood Transformation Potion, steal the identity of other players! ![Blood Transformation Potion Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kPUC5r9v/images/8f4b975af9684c8ea5eb2fac989eef9939259b48.png) -- Floating Staff, make animals float up and out of you way! ![Floating Staff recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kPUC5r9v/images/a6ec3245380651cabf75dfbe3113f6d0a1e032a9.png) -- Pogo Stick, jump around with it or use it to reach high places! ![Pogo stick recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kPUC5r9v/images/1f84a0587fdb577628cf359417224e407c572e6d.png) --Skateboard, slide down a mountain or just use it cheekely to prevent fall damage, but be careful, you may end up flying away! ![Skateboard recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kPUC5r9v/images/4d72d26a3f4d56bdaca6029fb2b4fa21586084d8.png) --Tennis Racket, a new weapon that uses cobblestone as your ball, right click to throw the ball into the air and hit it with the racket to throw it at your foes, or play tennis with a friend if they also got a racket! ![Tennis racket recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kPUC5r9v/images/24cf2dd9a01f6a1a7d13b6f79f4fe57e57366656.png)
